biodiversity and sustainable utilization
of its benefit.
B) All nations are free to utilize natural
resources and also harm the
ecosystem.
C) Significant reduction in the current
rate of biodiversity loss at global,
regional and local levels.
D) None of these
100. What is correct about the historic
convention on biological diversity?
(Pg. 267, E)
(i) It held in Rio de Janeiro
(ii) In 1992
